obligations.rule: Return false if the input is null, empty, or contains invalid characters like spaces or angle brackets.
obligations.why: Ensure early return for invalid input formats.

obligations.rule: Return false if the URL starts with 'mailto:'.
obligations.why: Special case handling for mailto URLs.

obligations.rule: Enforce maximum URL length if validate_length is true.
obligations.why: Ensure URLs exceeding max_allowed_length are rejected.

test_groups.title: Basic input validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers early returns for null, empty, or invalid characters in input.

test_groups.title: Special case: mailto URLs
test_groups.rationale: Ensures URLs starting with 'mailto:' are rejected.

test_groups.title: Maximum URL length enforcement
test_groups.rationale: Tests enforcement of maximum URL length when validate_length is true.
